Chat with AuthorClaw
Hello! I'm AuthorClaw, your AI writing partner. How can I help you today?
Commands: /novel, /project, /write, /files, /read, /export, /speak, /voice, /status, /stop, /clean, /help

Author Personas

Uploaded Documents
Loading documents...
Compiled Outputs
No compiled outputs yet.

One-off tools — these also run inside each book's workflow.

Revision Analysis

Runs the coordinated specialist passes (continuity, voice, craft, anti-slop) against pasted chapter text and returns a prioritized findings report. The anti-slop + craft passes work with no API keys configured; continuity + voice passes need a project selected.

Contradiction Check

Diffs a chapter against the project's entity database and prior chapter summaries, flagging evidence-chained contradictions (character, timeline, setting, plot).

Character Critique

Each major character reviews their own dialogue in a chapter, flagging off-voice, anachronistic-knowledge, or off-motivation lines with in-voice rewrites.

Reader Panels

Runs a tournament of your candidates against a demographically varied synthetic reader panel and ranks them by win rate. Works with any active AI provider, including free tiers (Ollama/Gemini) — confidence may be lower on smaller models.

Prose Evolve

Runs a GEPA-style evolve loop: scores your passage, reflects on its weakest points, revises, and keeps only rounds that beat the running best. Works with any active AI provider, including free tiers (Ollama/Gemini) — the judge may be weaker on smaller models.

Learn from Chapter

Runs the quality tools (revision, contradiction, character critique) against a chapter and learns durable lessons from recurring patterns. Learned lessons feed forward into future writing via the project's lesson store.

Author Sites

Lists sites registered in the site registry (GET /api/sites) and probes which deploy tools are installed on this machine (GET /api/site-deploy/doctor). Rendering and deploying happen elsewhere in the app — this card is read-only.

Loading sites...
Launch Timeline

Builds the 90-day launch plan (pre-order, ARC seeding, launch day, follow-ups) for a project + target release date. Display-only — every external action in the timeline is gated behind the confirmation flow elsewhere in the app; nothing here executes anything.

Translation Planner

Estimates cost + market ROI for translating a manuscript into one or more foreign-rights languages (POST /api/translation/plan). Display-only — this never calls /propose or /execute, so no translation work is kicked off from this card.

BookBub Deal Builder

Assembles a BookBub Featured Deal submission draft (BookBub-style blurb, price point, rationale) from your Amazon listing details (POST /api/bookbub/draft). Produces a draft to review and paste into partners.bookbub.com manually — nothing is submitted from here.

AMS Ads Optimizer

Paste exported Amazon Advertising keyword performance data (one row per keyword) and get pause/bid recommendations (POST /api/ams/optimize). Never proposes a bid increase over 2x and never executes anything in AMS — recommendations only.

Story Structures

Browse the built-in beat-sheet library (GET /api/structures), check a pasted outline against a chosen structure's beats (POST /api/structures/check-outline), or get a genre-based recommendation (POST /api/structures/recommend). Advisory only — nothing here forces a structure on your project.

Loading structures...
Plot Promises

Tracks Sanderson-style "promises and payoffs": what the opening chapters implicitly promise the reader, and whether later chapters pay them off (GET/POST /api/projects/:id/plot-promises). Extraction and audit are analysis only — nothing is rewritten.

Select a project to view tracked promises.
Character Voices

Builds a per-character style fingerprint from dialogue as chapters are written, then flags "drift" — moments where a character stops sounding like themselves (GET/POST /api/projects/:id/character-voices). Ingest and drift-detection are local analysis, no rewriting.

Select a project to view character voice fingerprints.
Series Bible

Cross-book memory for multi-project series: merges entity indexes, timelines, and contradictions across every book in a series (GET /api/series, GET /api/series/:id/report). Read-only — series are created/managed elsewhere in the app.

Select a series to view its bible.
Welcome — connect at least one AI provider to get started

AuthorClaw needs an API key (paid) or a local Ollama install (free) to write. Pick one:

  • Free + cloud: Get a Gemini API key from Google AI Studio (link below)
  • Free + local: Install Ollama and run ollama serve — auto-detected
  • Paid + best quality: Get a Claude or OpenAI key
API Keys (Cloud Providers)

Keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM in the local vault. Values are never sent anywhere except the provider's own API. Click Get key next to a provider to open its sign-up page.

Need to load keys from a shared folder (VM / Docker)?

AI Models

Pick which model each provider uses. Providers without an API key are shown greyed out — add a key above to enable them.

Loading...
OpenRouter Model

If you've added an OpenRouter API key above, pick which model AuthorClaw should use through it. Examples: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5, openai/gpt-4o, meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct, google/gemini-2.5-flash. Full list at openrouter.ai/models.

Local AI (Ollama) — free, no key

Ollama runs models on your own machine. No API key. Auto-detected when running. Default endpoint: http://localhost:11434

Checking...
Download Ollama →
Default AI Provider

Force all tasks to use one provider instead of smart tier routing. Per-project settings override this.

Default Image Provider

Which image AI to use when generating book covers. Per-call provider: still overrides this.

Telegram Integration
Loading...
Voice / TTS
Website Allowlist

Approved websites for AI research and tasks. One domain per line.

Autonomous Mode
Agent OFF
words/day
Idle Task Queue
When autonomous mode is enabled and there are no active projects, the agent picks a random enabled task. Edit the description to customize what the AI does.
Completed Idle Tasks
Loading...
Script Manager

Manage background scripts and processes. Auto-restart on crash, health monitoring, and log viewing.

Loading...
Backups

Create and restore workspace backups. Includes projects, personas, memory, and settings.

Lessons Learned

AuthorClaw learns from experience. High-confidence lessons are injected into every prompt.

Loading...
System Status
Loading…
User Preferences

Auto-detected from your messages (e.g. "I prefer first person POV"). You can also add or remove them here.
